adrs.title: All trackable work lives in the event-sourced hub
adrs.context_md: Task state scattered across chat logs and READMEs goes stale, cannot be audited, and cannot gate a deploy.
adrs.decision_md: Every trackable entity (task/adr/feat/gap/cap/deploy/note) lives in the hub event log under PROJECT/.hub; 'done' is granted only by the server-side complete endpoint (evidence + verification_command + recomputed audit).
adrs.consequences_md: One source of truth; CI and deploys gate on the recomputed hubaudit, never on self-attested status.

tasks.title: Wire the hub into the project and run the first audit
tasks.acceptance: manage.py hubaudit exits 0 (PASS or amber-only) from a clean checkout.

tasks.title: Record the first real feature task with acceptance criteria and a verification_command
tasks.acceptance: A new task exists whose verification_command the hub can run server-side.
